CTR001.message: Required class and method annotations are missing.
CTR001.description: The class must include @Controller or @RestController annotations, and methods must include @RequestMapping, @GetMapping, @PostMapping, or similar annotations.

CTR002.description: @Controller or @RestController class annotations must be included.

CTR003.description: Method annotations such as @RequestMapping, @GetMapping, or @PostMapping must be included.

SVC001.message: Class annotation and interface requirements are not satisfied.
SVC001.description: @Service must annotate the class, it should extend EgovAbstractServiceImpl, and the service must implement its interface.

SVC002.message: Required class inheritance rule is not satisfied.
SVC002.description: The class must inherit from EgovAbstractServiceImpl.

SVC003.description: @Service annotation must be present on the class.

SVC004.message: Interface implementation rule is not satisfied.
SVC004.description: Each service must declare a corresponding interface and provide an implementation.

DAO001.description: The class must extend EgovAbstractDAO or EgovAbstractMapper, specify the @Mapper annotation, or use JPA/Hibernate.
